_description: Single source of truth for what goes live on each channel. One entry per publish slot. Agents must check this file before scheduling any upload — if a canonical entry exists for a slot, do not schedule another video there without first setting the existing entry to canonical: false and adding a superseded_by field.
_rule: To replace a canonical: first set old entry canonical=false + superseded_by=<new_id>, then add new entry with canonical=true. Never have two canonical:true entries for the same channel+date.
_timezone_note: Slots stored in UTC. YouTube Studio displays dates in browser local timezone — Jun 2 06:00 UTC shows as Jun 1 in Pacific/Mountain time. Dates confirmed from YouTube Studio screenshot.
